svg.desc: SUPERSEDED — Pre-teal era, violet accent. DS §16 FLAG-005. Do not use as a build target. See DS §16 FLAG-005. Component: StatusBar (expanded state — history panel open with 6 entries) Page: Session chat page — between MessageList and MessageInput Design system version: 2.3 (2026-03-09) Artboards: desktop 1440px (component shown at 804px chat-column width within a 960px mockup frame)
svg.text: What were the results of the database query?
I ran several tools to look that up. Here's what I
found so far — I'm still searching the web now.
Timestamps + durations — 4.7:1 on bg-zinc-50 ✓ WCAG AA
bg-zinc-50 (#fafafa) throughout — no color change between history panel and summary row | border-b border-zinc-200 (#e4e4e7) divides the two regions
History panel: px-4 (16px) py-1.5 (6px) | Each entry: py-0.5 (2px top + 2px bottom) | gap-2 (8px) between icon and tool name
bg-violet-500 (#8b5cf6) — secondary activity signal; subordinate to header AgentStateBadge dot (bg-violet-600)
X icon text-red-600 (#dc2626, 5.9:1 on zinc-50 ✓) | "failed" label text-red-600 font-mono | Tool name stays text-zinc-700 (not red)
Panel expand/collapse: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out (max-height 0 → max-h-48, overflow-hidden) | Running dot: animate-pulse
Panel: role="log" aria-label="Tool activity history" aria-live="off" | Toggle: aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Collapse tool history" | Focus: ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-zinc-400
